title: pteroglossaspis ecristata
side_effects: Pteroglossaspis ecristata can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, dizziness, and headaches in individuals who consume it in large quantities. It may also lead to allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in people with sensitive skin or respiratory conditions. Overuse of the plant may result in stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and vomiting due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In extreme cases, improper use of Pteroglossaspis ecristata can even cause organ damage and long-term health complications.
